description: Track folder for skilled-agent-orchestration packets — improving how skills, agents, commands, and CLI executors collaborate across the OpenCode runtime. Hosts spec folders 051-070+ covering CLI providers, skill patterns + removals, sk-code merger + fullstack split, command-spec-kit UX, agent improvements, deep-loop stress tests, sk-doc alignment, agent creation, skill-advisor re-indexing, MCP transfers, sk-doc reorg, motion.dev integration, and rename refactors.
